message:
Merge pull request #109 from kubestellar/fix-presigned-url-endpoint

🐛 Fix presigned URL endpoint for raw build-log links

files.patch:
@@ -103,6 +103,11 @@ spec:
             - --cookie-secret=/etc/cookie/secret
             - --plugin-config=/etc/plugins/plugins.yaml
             - --kubeconfig=/etc/kubeconfigs/kubeconfig
+          env:
+            # Override MinIO endpoint for presigned URL generation
+            # This ensures presigned URLs use the external hostname instead of internal
+            - name: MINIO_SERVER_URL
+              value: "https://minio.kubestellar.io"
           ports:
             - name: http
               containerPort: 8080

@@ -108,6 +108,11 @@ spec:
             - --kubeconfig=/etc/kubeconfigs/kubeconfig
             - --oauth-url=/github-login
             - --github-oauth-config-file=/etc/github-oauth/secret
+          env:
+            # Override MinIO endpoint for presigned URL generation
+            # This ensures presigned URLs use the external hostname instead of internal
+            - name: MINIO_SERVER_URL
+              value: "https://minio.kubestellar.io"
           ports:
             - name: http
               containerPort: 8080

@@ -7,13 +7,11 @@ metadata:
     nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-body-size: "0"
     nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-read-timeout: "600"
     nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-send-timeout: "600"
-    # Allow HTTP access for presigned URLs (they use http:// not https://)
-    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/ssl-redirect: "false"
   name: minio
   namespace: prow
 spec:
   rules:
-  # External access via minio.kubestellar.io
+  # External access to MinIO for presigned URLs and artifact viewing
   - host: minio.kubestellar.io
     http:
       paths:
@@ -24,18 +22,6 @@ spec:
               number: 80
         path: /
         pathType: Prefix
-  # Workaround for presigned URLs that use internal hostname
-  # Users need to add "129.80.226.250 minio.prow.svc.cluster.local" to /etc/hosts
-  - host: minio.prow.svc.cluster.local
-    http:
-      paths:
-      - backend:
-          service:
-            name: minio
-            port:
-              number: 80
-        path: /
-        pathType: Prefix
   tls:
   - hosts:
     - minio.kubestellar.io
